tasks.label: docker-compose-up
tasks.command: docker-compose -f ${workspaceFolder}/services/docker-compose.dev.yaml up -d emails emails-db products products-db orders orders-db products-consumer --build

tasks.label: wait-for-debugpy
tasks.command: powershell -command "Start-Sleep 2; while (!(Test-NetConnection localhost -Port 5678).TcpTestSucceeded) { Write-Host 'Waiting for debugpy...'; Start-Sleep 1 }; Write-Host 'debugpy ready!'"
